articles.title: JJ Redick Compares LeBron James In Transition To Mack Truck
articles.original_title: JJ Redick Compares LeBron James In Transition To Mack Truck
articles.summary: The role players of the Los Angeles Lakers have stepped up in a massive way so far in their first round playoff series against the Houston Rockets and have gotten much deserved praise for doing so. But make no mistake, superstar LeBron James continues to lead the way for this team without their leading scorers […]

articles.title: How the Thunder helped heal Oklahoma City 30 years after unimaginable terror
articles.original_title: How the Thunder helped heal Oklahoma City 30 years after unimaginable terror
articles.summary: For 30 years, the Oklahoma City bombing -- the most devastating act of homegrown terrorism in history -- has been seared into the identity of the city. Since 2008, the Thunder have been trying to honor it -- and give the fans a new one.

articles.title: Rare playoff dud by Jokic puts Nuggets in 2-1 hole
articles.original_title: Rare playoff dud by Jokic puts Nuggets in 2-1 hole
articles.summary: It was a night to forget for Nuggets star Nikola Jokic, who missed 19 of his 26 shots in a blowout Game 3 loss that gave the Timberwolves a 2-1 series lead.

articles.title: McCollum's clutch shot squashes Knicks' late rally
articles.original_title: McCollum's clutch shot squashes Knicks' late rally
articles.summary: CJ McCollum hit a fadeaway jumper with 12.5 seconds left, lifting the Hawks to a 2-1 lead over the Knicks in their first-round playoff series Thursday night.

articles.title: Barrett, Barnes combine for 66 to revive Raptors
articles.original_title: Barrett, Barnes combine for 66 to revive Raptors
articles.summary: The Raptors proved they could "make some noise" in their first-round series against the Cavs, as RJ Barrett and Scottie Barnes each scored 33 points in a 126-104 rout in Thursday night's Game 3.

articles.title: Scoreless Bridges sits most of 2nd half in loss
articles.original_title: Scoreless Bridges sits most of 2nd half in loss
articles.summary: Knicks coach Mike Brown isn't yet ready to bench Mikal Bridges, but he took a step toward it in a disappointing Game 3 finish in Atlanta.

articles.title: Lakers' Reaves upgraded to questionable for G3
articles.original_title: Lakers' Reaves upgraded to questionable for G3
articles.summary: Lakers guard Austin Reaves, who hasn't been sidelined since straining his left oblique April 2, was upgraded to questionable for Game 3, while Rockets star Kevin Durant was listed as questionable because of a sprained left ankle.

articles.title: NBA fines Booker for blasting refs, rescinds tech
articles.original_title: NBA fines Booker for blasting refs, rescinds tech
articles.summary: The NBA has fined Devin Booker $35,000 for publicly criticizing officials following the Suns' Game 2 loss to the Thunder.

articles.title: Sources: Bucks finalizing deal to hire Jenkins

articles.summary: The Milwaukee Bucks are finalizing a deal to hire Taylor Jenkins as the franchise's new head coach, sources told ESPN on Thursday.

articles.title: Wemby to travel with Spurs while in protocol
articles.original_title: Wemby to travel with Spurs while in protocol
